description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of an older man with a mustache in a dark red collared shirt, captioned 'CHILD SEX ABUSE' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with an 'Atlanta' label and an ICE logo.
